name: Jack Link's 500
comments: Austin Cindric won the Jack Link's 500 at Talladega Superspeedway, his third victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: No. 44 (Unapproved Adjustments).
